run_summary: Re-applied EXP-258 (WIN-010 ISS-1523) and EXP-253 (§4.2.2/§4.2.3 ISS-1550) with curmudgeon c1 moderate fixes incorporated. Closed 2 issues. Processed 3 analyst proposals. Popped 0 new curmudgeon reviews (EXP-253 was already popped in prior run). Also fixes build_reproducibility failure flagged by integrity.

patches_applied.description: EXP-258: softened unargued 'approximately common multiplicative error at first order' claim to pre-registered α ∈ {0.8, 1.0, 1.2} sensitivity check for post-2026-08-12 analysis. Verdict (Std Model Explains) unchanged.

EXP-253 with curmudgeon c1 fixes: (1) 'replaced with a strawman' → 'treated as zero in the dome's published rule', (2) '3.6× outside the ±3 nT envelope' → '3.6× the falsification half-width (|−10.9|/3≈3.6), well outside...acceptance window', (3) 'The dome treats zero...' → 'The dome's published falsification criterion and live countdown banner treat zero...', (4) §4.2.3 semicolon splice → two sentences.

proposals_processed.action: acknowledged and resolved — EXP-258 + EXP-253 re-applied this run; root cause (prior run wrote daily-report claiming apply but didn't modify data files) noted for tinker audit if it recurs
acknowledged — EXP-255/256/257 correctly in curmudgeon queue (qids 266/267/268); no integration yet per HNOTE directive
